introSection: Hurricane (Japanese: ハリケーン) is a steel roller coaster currently located at Himeji Central Park in Himeji, Hyōgo, Japan. It originally opened as Tornado (Japanese:トルネイダー) at Kintetsu Ayameike in Nara, Nara, Japan.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Green track with red rails and blue supports. The ride used to feature red track with yellow rails and white supports before that. Its first scheme featured yellow track with white rails and supports.

fullText:
Hurricane (Japanese: ハリケーン) is a steel roller coaster currently located at Himeji Central Park in Himeji, Hyōgo, Japan. It originally opened as Tornado (Japanese:トルネイダー) at Kintetsu Ayameike in Nara, Nara, Japan.



Green track with red rails and blue supports. The ride used to feature red track with yellow rails and white supports before that. Its first scheme featured yellow track with white rails and supports.




 * Hurricane on the park's website
